content.en:
The reason why Ye Tian agreed to the First Elder was naturally not that he hoped that the First Elder would break through, but that he needed a period of peaceful development.

And once the First Demon Venerable breaks through in half a step, with his current strength, he will really be unable to compete, even if it is the Heavenly Sword Plate, he may not be able to withstand the attack of the First Demon Venerable.

Therefore, the Heavenly Sword Disc blocked the attack of the First Demon Venerable, but he didn't want to go out.

Right now, the first elder is still needed to fight against the first demon venerable.

"First Elder, where is the Valley of Mythology?" Ye Tian asked.

Although he is a patriarch, he has never heard of the Valley of Myths.

The First Elder revealed: "The Valley of Myths is in a special space-time node, because it contains a lot of opportunities, but it is too dangerous, so I did not announce it, and only a few Elders know about it at present. I'm also worried that some patriarchs will definitely die if they enter without permission!"

Soon, the first patriarch informed the exact location.

Then, he took out three more innate primal treasures: "Ye Tian, these are three defensive innate primordial treasures, left for you to save your life." "

"First Elder, then I'm welcome!"

Ye Tian received these three innate primordial treasures.

The innate original treasure, he will not dislike much.

The first patriarch gave it to him, and he asked for it.

Moreover, the first patriarch has been a long time, and he doesn't know how many innate primordial treasures he has accumulated, and he has no juniors, so taking out just three innate primordial treasures is nothing to him at all.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went to the Valley of Mythology.

After Ye Tian left.

"I hope Ye Tian can find a mythical golden grass, otherwise if the First Demon Venerable breaks through, he will definitely come to me for trouble as soon as possible!"

The First Elder muttered.

......

Valley of Myths.

Ye Tian shuttled for a long time before arriving here.

"Broken!"

The space-time node was broken by Ye Tian, and he escaped into it and saw the Valley of Myths.

The Valley of Myths seemed small and boundless, and a strange force was drawing him in.

According to what the first patriarch said, the Valley of Myths is easy to enter but difficult to come out, and it can only be rushed out in a special period.

In other words, if he enters the Valley of Mythology, he will not be able to get out for a long time.

And this time is about five million to the Dao era.

For the patriarch, the five million Solsice Era is not very long, but the first patriarch does not dare to leave for a moment, otherwise it will be very dangerous.

Wow!

Ye Tian escaped directly into the Valley of Myths.

......

Inside the Valley of Myths.

Ye Tian sensed the suppression of this piece of heaven and earth for the first time, as if the bones of his body were about to be crushed, and it took a while to get used to it.

"It's such a terrifying suppression of heaven and earth, it is worthy of being a treasure land that even the top elders dare not enter!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As soon as he came in, he used his copying talent to scout the surroundings.

According to the First Patriarch, it has been a long time since the Patriarch has come in, and the information here is still known in the past.

According to past information, there are a small number of mythical creatures in the Mythical Valley, all of them have lived for an infinite number of years, and their strength is very terrifying, comparable to the top elders.

But in the Valley of Myths, the real horror is the Spirit of Myths.

The upgraded version of the Spirit of Myth Stone Legend Spirit is very terrifying, but the Spirit of Myth is also bound by the Valley of Mythology, and can only stay in one place and cannot leave too far.

The Mythical Golden Grass is actually a special kind of mythical spirit, and it must have a mythical spirit around it.

Some mythical spirits may even be comparable to the First Patriarch, and perhaps there are mythical spirits that are even more powerful than the First Patriarch, and this is all possible things.

Of course.

If you are lucky, you will encounter a weaker Mythical Spirit, and Ye Tiandu will hope to kill it.

And the first elder is to let Ye Tian try, once he encounters a powerful mythical spirit, he will run away as soon as possible, and when he encounters a weaker mythical spirit, he will go to see if there is a mythical golden grass there.

However, the Mythical Golden Grass was very rare, and the First Patriarch was not sure if there was any Mythical Golden Grass here.

He had only come in once before he was very old, but he had not received the Mythical Golden Grass.

Now, in this era, he and the First Demon Venerable are holding each other back, and no one dares to enter the Valley of Mythology.

During this period, they also sent the Demon Venerable and the Patriarch in, but they all fell, and there were no Demon Venerable and Patriarch in the future.

If it weren't for the fact that the First Demon Venerable might break through in half a step this time, the First Elder would not let Ye Tian in.

......

"Mythical Valley has a lot of resources, maybe I can get amazing treasures and resources, so that my strength will skyrocket!"

Ye Tian secretly looked forward to it.

Immediately, he began to condense his second copy body, and the third copy body.

Mythical Valley is so dangerous, it is normal for the copy body to fall, so he naturally has to get a few more copy bodies and go to find the Mythical Golden Grass again and again.

Soon.

Ye Tian let himself explore a replica body.

Rumble!!!!!

A mythical creature has appeared, appearing to be a tiger mythical creature.

【Mythical Tiger】

The strength of this mythical-level creature is terrifying, its cultivation is comparable to the peak of the Mythical Dao Realm, its physical body is also very powerful, and its body is also filled with the aura of the first sequence of Dao rules.

In terms of strength, it is definitely comparable to the first thirty-six elders.

"I just entered the Valley of Mythology, and I met a mythical creature comparable to the thirty-six patriarchs, no wonder the first patriarch didn't let the other patriarchs in, whoever came in died!"

Rumble!!!!

This Mythical Xuanhu attacked Ye Tian, and the terrifying Mythical Body power burst out, coupled with the power of the first sequence of supreme rules, the opponent's blow was enough to kill the general second-grade elder in an instant.

However, for Ye Tian, this mythical Xuanhu was nothing.

"Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules!"

Ye Tian held a spear in his hand, pierced through this mythical Xuanhu with one blow, and the Eternal Sequence Dao Rules exploded, directly destroying its body and shattering its vitality.

In an instant, this mythical tiger fell.

"My current strength can already kill a top veteran of the rank of the thirty-fifth elder in seconds!" Ye Tian muttered.

Then, he put away the body of this mythical Xuanhu, a corpse of a mythical creature of this grade is also a bit valuable.

Instantly, he continued on his way, not encountering a mythical creature, but soon after, he broke into the territory of a mythical spirit.

Airplanes!!!

A crisis was born, and he was targeted.

"It's the Spirit of Myth!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Airplanes!

A golden humanoid phantom appeared, somewhat similar to the Spirit of Legends, but far more terrifying than the Spirit of Legends.

This is the true spirit of mythology!
